'''shadhuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hicotee|hicotee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hicotee|hicotee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shadhuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shædhivith|shædhivith]] || [[word:shædhivij|shædhivij]] || [[word:shædhivish|shædhivish]] || [[word:shædhivi|shædhivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadhudhuvuth|shadhudhuvuth]] || [[word:shadhudhuvuj|shadhudhuvuj]] || [[word:shadhudhuvush|shadhudhuvush]] || [[word:shadhudhuvu|shadhudhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadhuvuth|shadhuvuth]] || [[word:shadhuvuj|shadhuvuj]] || [[word:shadhuvush|shadhuvush]] || [[word:shadhuvu|shadhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhufvuth|shadhufvuth]] || [[word:shadhufvuj|shadhufvuj]] || [[word:shadhufvush|shadhufvush]] || [[word:shadhufvuf|shadhufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shadhuvuthu|shadhuvuthu]] || [[word:shadhuvuju|shadhuvuju]] || [[word:shadhuvushu|shadhuvushu]] || [[word:shadhuvuku|shadhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shadhuvuth|shadhuvuth]] || [[word:shadhuvuj|shadhuvuj]] || [[word:shadhuvush|shadhuvush]] || [[word:shadhuvu|shadhuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shadhuvuthul|shadhuvuthul]] || [[word:shadhuvujul|shadhuvujul]] || [[word:shadhuvushul|shadhuvushul]] || [[word:shadhuvukul|shadhuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shadhuvuthuthu|shadhuvuthuthu]] || [[word:shadhuvujuju|shadhuvujuju]] || [[word:shadhuvushushu|shadhuvushushu]] || [[word:shadhuvuku|shadhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shadhuvuthun|shadhuvuthun]] || [[word:shadhuvujun|shadhuvujun]] || [[word:shadhuvushun|shadhuvushun]] || [[word:shadhuvukun|shadhuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shadhuvuthuoro|shadhuvuthuoro]] || [[word:shadhuvujuoro|shadhuvujuoro]] || [[word:shadhuvushuoro|shadhuvushuoro]] || [[word:shadhuvukuoro|shadhuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
